assertions.description: When no dashboards are affected by the PR, no screenshot is taken
assertions.evidence: No files exist in v2/screenshots/. Agent did not invoke Playwright MCP at all.

assertions.description: Agent reports that no dashboards were affected
assertions.evidence: Agent output included: 'No dashboards affected by this PR — skipping screenshots'.

assertions.description: No git commit was created for screenshots
assertions.evidence: git log shows no new commits with 'screenshot' in the message.
